findings.title: Concrete ArtifactRef types are used where only queries/templates exist
findings.detail: The design applies `ChangeArtifactRef`/`RunArtifactRef` to `list` and to the static phase gate matrix, but those contexts do not have a concrete artifact identity yet. `ChangeArtifactStore.list` needs `(changeId, artifactType)` before a qualifier exists, `RunArtifactStore.list(changeId?)` has no `runId`, and a static gate matrix cannot embed runtime `changeId` values. Split these into separate query/requirement descriptor types and keep `*ArtifactRef` only for already-identified artifacts.

findings.title: Review-ledger backup is incorrectly made caller-optional
findings.detail: The spec requires every overwrite of an existing `review-ledger` artifact to create a backup before writing. `WriteOptions.backupIfClean` weakens that contract and lets callers skip required backups. Remove the caller-controlled flag from the store contract and make ledger backup unconditional inside `ChangeArtifactStore.write`, or keep any cleanliness check entirely outside the backup guarantee.

findings.title: Adapter invariant enforcement is not covered by the design/tasks
findings.detail: Acceptance criteria require adapters to reject unknown artifact types with a typed error and to validate `review-ledger` and `run-state` JSON against their schemas. D2 explicitly rejects runtime validation, and the tasks never add adapter-side runtime guards or schema-validation steps/tests. Add explicit validation behavior and tests in the adapter or shared validation layer so these invariants are actually implemented, not just typed in TypeScript.

findings.title: Ownership, lifecycle, and adapter-specific documentation are missing from the task plan
findings.detail: The proposal and acceptance criteria require a canonical model that enumerates each artifact's storage domain, ownership, lifecycle, and that the filesystem layout is documented as an adapter concern rather than a core contract. The tasks only cover code structures and migrations. Add explicit work to produce the ownership/lifecycle table and document the LocalFs layout boundary in the spec/docs so the implementation can satisfy those acceptance criteria.
